programs.title: Food Unwrapped
programs.desc: A selection of favourite investigations. Matt Tebbutt investigates oysters in China. Jimmy Doherty checks out London dry gin. Kate Quilton asks if herbal bedtime teas can help you nod off.

programs.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Charlotte and Lucy hope to impress their rivals with their quirky decor at Acqua Beach in Weymouth. But guest Derek upsets Charlotte with his comments on her design choices.
